zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ros於大約1124年出生在英國越可爾爾姆斯利時，他的父親Sir Piers de Ros38歲，母親Adeline Espec32歲。他於大約1144年與Sybil de Valognes在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1169年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1162年在英國越可爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國越可爾爾姆斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ros于大约1124年出生在英国越可爾爾姆斯利时，他的父亲Sir Piers de Ros38岁，母亲Adeline Espec32岁。他于大约1144年与Sybil de Valognes在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1169年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1162年在英国越可爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国越可爾爾姆斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ros was born about 1124, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Piers de Ros, was 38 and his mother, Adeline Espec, was 32. He married Sybil de Valognes about 1144, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1169. He died about 1162, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ros est né environ 1124, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Piers de Ros, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adeline Espec, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Sybil de Valognes environ 1144, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1169. Il est décédé environ 1162, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ros um 1124 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Piers de Ros 38 und seine Mutter Adeline Espec 32. Er hat um 1144 in York, Yorkshire, England Sybil de Valognes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1169 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1162 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ros è nato il circa 1124 nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Piers de Ros, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Adeline Espec, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Sybil de Valognes circa 1144, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1169. Morì circa 1162, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Helmsley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Rosが約1124年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Piers de Rosは38歳，母Adeline Especは32歳であった。約1144年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでSybil de Valognesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1162年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ros(이)가 대략 1124년 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Piers de Ros(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline Espec(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1144년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Sybil de Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 요르크실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ros nasceu aproximadamente 1124, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Piers de Ros, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adeline Espec, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil de Valognes aproximadamente 1144, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1169. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1162, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ros родился около 1124 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Piers de Ros было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline Espec, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Valognes около 1144 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1169 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1162 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1124–about 1162: e tusa o le 1124–e tusa o le 1162

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ros nació aproximadamente 1124, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Piers de Ros, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adeline Espec, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sybil de Valognes aproximadamente 1144, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1169. Murió aproximadamente 1162, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
